title: toona ciliata var. grandifoliola
intro: Toona ciliata var. grandifoliola, also known as the narrow-leaved cedar or small-leaved toona, is a variety of the Toona ciliata tree, native to Australia and Southeast Asia, with large, elliptical leaves and fragrant wood. The medicinal properties of this plant include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Toona ciliata var. grandifoliola include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the tree are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
